channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 23.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think if you come in as a new prime minister, in these circumstances, the policy case for "if you get a bounce, spend it" is really, really strong.
But in practice I just don't think it's the kind of thing a new p...
item.description:
I think if you come in as a new prime minister, in these circumstances, the policy case for "if you get a bounce, spend it" is really, really strong.
But in practice I just don't think it's the kind of thing a new p...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting says Starmer ‘behind the curve’ on under-16s social media ban – UK politics live

item.title: The Telegraph: Wes Streeting: Social media is the new smoking - The Telegraph
item.description: Wes Streeting: Social media is the new smoking - The Telegraph

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New post:
"What would Andy Burnham's government look like?"
He still has to win the by-election but Westminster is already planning for a new PM.
What would his cabinet + No. 10 look like? His policy agenda? The f...
item.description:
New post:
"What would Andy Burnham's government look like?"
He still has to win the by-election but Westminster is already planning for a new PM.
What would his cabinet + No. 10 look like? His policy agenda? The f...
